report.summary: Day 16 cycle 3 standup: Full 6-agent cycle completed last hour — PayFi guide + PayFiYieldCalculator shipped, 5 reviews published (~327 pages live), production healthy (G7qnG32bm Ready), PUBLISH_QUEUE down to 7 items; next cycle focuses on FOMC content window (T-3 days), remaining exchange review batch, and Jefe blockers.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Last Cycle
items: Pages live: ~327 — up from 322 at standup-v2; +5 net from Day 32 batch: /investing/staking/reviews/rocket-pool, /defi-lending/reviews/aave, /defi-lending/reviews/compound, /defi-lending/reviews/morpho, /exchanges/reviews/coinbase all promoted and live

PUBLISH_QUEUE: 7 items remaining — 4 exchange reviews (Binance, Kraken, Bybit, OKX) + 3 learn guides (/learn/kaito-ai-infofi-guide, /learn/btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026, /learn/aave-v4-guide); ready for next publish cycle

PayFi page upgrade: /learn/payfi-guide rebuilt with March 2026 market data, Huma Finance coverage, GENIUS Act regulatory context, and interactive PayFiYieldCalculator component — new lead content angle for FOMC week
Bloomberg Screener V3: Continues live on DefiLlama real TVL/APY/Volume data — highest-traffic tool fully credentialed; no degradation reported
GSC organic signals: Day 16 of 14–21 window — earliest clicks still expected today or tomorrow; /tools/bloomberg-screener now benefits from live data credibility ahead of GSC signal arrival
FOMC catalyst: T-3 days (Wed Mar 19) — PayFi + live Bloomberg Screener V3 + GENIUS Act thread now fully pre-staged for a 3-pronged narrative push

Community coverage: Social calendar extended through Friday Mar 20 (v14); FOMC-day PayFi tweet drafted; Thursday newsletter updated with PayFi section + 3 subject line variants; PayFi SVG social card created (social-payfi-guide-2026.svg)

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ PayFi guide upgrade — /learn/payfi-guide rebuilt with 2026 market data, Huma Finance, GENIUS Act context (build cycle, this hour)
SHIPPED ✅ PayFiYieldCalculator — interactive yield modeling component added to PayFi guide page (build cycle, this hour)
SHIPPED ✅ Day 32 publish batch — 5 review pages (Rocket Pool, Aave, Compound, Morpho, Coinbase) promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES; Vercel redeploy triggered (deployment G7qnG32bm)
SHIPPED ✅ Design pass — PayFi OG image (1200×630 SVG+PNG), accessibility and mobile layout refinements applied across PayFi guide + calculator (design cycle, this hour)
SHIPPED ✅ Community v14 — GENIUS Act / PayFi regulatory thread (6 posts), FOMC-day PayFi tweet, newsletter updated, social-payfi-guide-2026.svg created, posting schedule through Mar 20 locked
SHIPPED ✅ EOD QA — production healthy, G7qnG32bm status: Ready; all 6 API routes structurally sound with correct caching + fallback patterns; 2 TS errors non-blocking
CARRY-OVER 🔴 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required; blocks wallet connections, gamification attribution, referral tracking for all 327 live pages
CARRY-OVER 🔴 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe action required (~15 min combined with WalletConnect); blocks Playwright CI before any Sprint 60 merges
CARRY-OVER 🟡 AICourseRecommendations.tsx — 2 non-blocking TS errors; partially improved in 1b4a15e, full resolution pending
OPEN 🟡 PUBLISH_QUEUE 7 items — exchange reviews (Binance, Kraken, Bybit, OKX) + 3 learn guides ready to promote; no Sprint 60 scaffold yet beyond PayFi

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Maximize FOMC content window (Wed Mar 19, T-3 days). PayFi is now the strongest narrative angle — GENIUS Act regulatory framing + live Bloomberg Screener V3 data + PayFiYieldCalculator = a rare convergence of regulatory catalyst, live tooling, and evergreen SEO content. Activate: Community Manager executes GENIUS Act thread + FOMC-day PayFi posts on schedule; Programmer verifies Bloomberg Screener refresh rate holds under spike traffic; SEO Content confirms PayFi metadata and structured data are optimized for 'payfi crypto 2026' and 'GENIUS Act stablecoins' intent.

PRIORITY 2 — Publish remaining 7-item queue before FOMC week. The 4 exchange reviews (Binance, Kraken, Bybit, OKX) are direct affiliate revenue pages — each needs to be indexed and accumulating clicks before the FOMC-week search spike. The 3 learn guides (kaito-ai-infofi, btcfi-bitcoin-defi, aave-v4) add topical depth that benefits the full site's authority score. Delegate: Publish Queue promotes all 7; SEO Content validates metadata on each before promotion; deploy immediately after.

PRIORITY 3 — Resolve Jefe blockers in a single 15-minute session. With 327 live pages and organic signals imminent, the absence of wallet connectivity means all new users arriving from Google have no retention hook — no gamification, no referral attribution, no repeat-visit incentive. The fix is two manual steps only Jefe can perform: (a) WalletConnect production Project ID via cloud.walletconnect.com, (b) GitHub Actions secrets in repo settings. Both are pre-documented from prior cycles. Every day without these is lost retention on pages that are about to start receiving organic traffic.
